src/api/ops.ts: Type-only aliases over the generated OpenAPI schema (src/api/types.d.ts) -- no runtime declarations, nothing to classify.
src/api/payloads.ts: Type-only re-exports of generated OpenAPI response shapes (src/api/types.d.ts) -- no runtime declarations, nothing to classify.
src/router.ts: Static React Router future-flag constants shared by main.tsx and every test's MemoryRouter -- a config value, not FCIS logic to classify.
src/replica/baseSchema.gen.ts: Generated verbatim from server/src/pkm/schema_dump.py (a SQL DDL string constant) -- data, not hand-written logic; see the file's own generated-file comment.
src/replica/testDb.ts: Test-only in-memory sqlite-wasm helper, excluded from unit coverage the same as *.test.ts (see vite.config.ts coverage.exclude) -- test support, not app runtime code.
src/test-helpers.ts: Shared test fixtures/mocks used only by *.test.ts files, excluded from unit coverage the same as test-setup.ts -- test support, not app runtime code.
src/test-setup.ts: Vitest global setup (jest-dom, WebSocket/matchMedia stubs), excluded from unit coverage -- test support, not app runtime code.
